formats.name: Product Only / White Background
formats.description: Product isolated on white or neutral background. Clean, minimal, distraction-free.
visual_signals: no people or lifestyle elements present
sharp product focus with high detail

formats.name: Product on Colored Background
formats.description: Product on vivid colored background to stand out in feed.
visual_signals: vivid or saturated solid color background
high contrast between product and background

formats.name: Hero Shot
formats.description: High-quality product image with curated lighting, slight suggestive context.
visual_signals: dramatic or curated lighting on product
negative_signals: plain white background with no context

formats.name: Detail Shot / Close-Up
formats.description: Zoom on texture, materials, finishes, stitching, ingredients.
visual_signals: visible texture, material, or fine detail
stitching, grain, or surface finish visible

formats.name: Scale Shot
formats.description: Product next to common objects (hands, people) to communicate real dimensions.
visual_signals: product placed next to hand, coin, or everyday object
human hand holding or touching product

formats.name: Product in Context / In-Situ
formats.description: Product in its natural use environment (sofa in living room, laptop on desk).
visual_signals: product placed in realistic use environment
room or setting matching product category
no people actively using the product
negative_signals: people actively using or wearing product

formats.name: Flat Lay / Knolling
formats.description: Products arranged from above in orderly geometric composition. Instagram-native aesthetic.
visual_signals: items arranged in orderly geometric pattern

formats.name: Still Life
formats.description: Artistic composition of product with scenic elements (flowers, fabrics, materials).
visual_signals: flowers, fabrics, or natural materials as accents
color palette coordination between product and props

formats.name: Still Life + Text Overlay
formats.description: Still life with overlaid text: claim, benefit, price, offer.
visual_signals: text overlay with claim, benefit, or value
graphic text elements over photographic base
blend of editorial photography and typography

formats.name: Product Collection / Grid
formats.description: Multiple products in grid or unique composition. Line, collection, catalog in one frame.
negative_signals: heavy text with no product grid

formats.name: Product Annotated / Point-Out
formats.description: Image with arrows, labels, callouts highlighting specific features.
visual_signals: arrows or lines pointing to product attributes
text labels or callout boxes on image
negative_signals: clean product image without graphic overlays

formats.name: Ingredient / Component Spotlight
formats.description: Focus on a single key ingredient or component.
visual_signals: single ingredient or raw material prominently displayed
natural elements like herbs, minerals, or compounds
close-up of component or active ingredient

formats.name: 360 / Multi-Angle
formats.description: Product shot from multiple angles for complete view. Often in carousel.
visual_signals: multiple views of same product in one image
negative_signals: different products rather than same product

formats.name: Packaging Shot
formats.description: Product in its packaging. Enhances brand experience.
visual_signals: product box or packaging prominently shown
negative_signals: people opening package (that would be unboxing)

formats.name: Bundle / Kit Shot
formats.description: Package of complementary products presented together.
visual_signals: products that work together as a set

formats.name: Animated Product Showcase
formats.description: 3D animation or motion graphics: rotation, component explosion, effects.
visual_signals: motion blur or animation frames visible

formats.name: Lifestyle / Product in Context
formats.description: Product inserted in aspirational or real environment (home, nature, office).
visual_signals: no person directly using the product
negative_signals: person actively using or wearing product

formats.name: Product Worn / In-Use
formats.description: Real people wearing or using the product.
visual_signals: person actively wearing or using the product
product visible on or in hands of user
focus on product functionality in use
negative_signals: people present but not using product

formats.name: Day in the Life / Mini Vlog
formats.description: Daily routine of a person with the product naturally integrated.
visual_signals: multiple scenes or moments from a day
negative_signals: no person or daily context visible

formats.name: GRWM (Get Ready With Me)
formats.description: Person gets ready (makeup, outfit, skincare) using the product.
visual_signals: person applying makeup, skincare, or getting dressed
beauty or grooming products in use

formats.name: Morning/Night Routine
formats.description: Sequence of products used in morning or evening routine.
visual_signals: multiple products lined up in order of use
time-of-day cues like sunrise or nighttime

formats.name: OOTD (Outfit of the Day)
formats.description: Complete outfit, often with transitions or zoom.
visual_signals: person posing to show complete look

formats.name: What I Eat in a Day
formats.description: All meals of the day with food products or kitchen tools.
visual_signals: multiple meals or food items shown
food products or kitchen tools in use
negative_signals: single dish only without day context

formats.name: Study/Work with Me
formats.description: Companion format: viewer accompanies creator during an activity.

formats.name: "That Girl" / Clean Aesthetic
formats.description: Tidy, healthy, curated lifestyle. Neutral palette, clean spaces, minimal products.
visual_signals: healthy lifestyle elements like smoothies or yoga

formats.name: Behind the Scenes (BTS)
formats.description: Look behind the scenes: production, team, laboratory. Transparency and authenticity.
visual_signals: team members or workers in action

formats.name: Process Shot / How It's Made
formats.description: Process of creation or working of the product. Justifies premium value.

formats.name: Pack an Order with Me
formats.description: Preparation of an order, often in ASMR/satisfying style.
visual_signals: hands packing items into box or bag
tissue paper, stickers, or branded materials
order slip or shipping label visible

formats.name: Founder Story
formats.description: Founder tells in first person the genesis of the brand/product.
visual_signals: single person speaking directly to camera
casual or personal setting (home office, workshop)
text overlay identifying person as founder or CEO
brand origin or mission context clues
negative_signals: no identifiable founder or leader figure

formats.name: Employee Spotlight / Team Content
formats.description: Team members shown authentically.
visual_signals: name tags, uniforms, or role titles visible

formats.name: UGC Classic
formats.description: Authentic content from real customers: non-professional photos/videos. CTR 4x vs branded.
visual_signals: product shown in genuine use context

formats.name: UGC Talking Head
formats.description: Creator speaks directly to camera about their experience with the product.

formats.name: Unboxing
formats.description: Opening of the package: packaging, first impression, contents. Generates anticipation.
visual_signals: hands opening a package or box
tissue paper or packaging materials visible
negative_signals: product already out of box and in use

formats.name: Haul
formats.description: Presentation of multiple purchased products in a single video.
visual_signals: bed or floor covered with items
excited presentation of variety of products

formats.name: Try-On
formats.description: Physical try-on of garments with reactions on fit, material, look.
visual_signals: person trying on clothing or accessories
multiple outfits or items tried sequentially
reactions to how items look or fit

formats.name: Reaction Video
formats.description: Spontaneous reaction to product: surprise, enthusiasm.
visual_signals: exaggerated facial expressions of surprise or delight
person reacting in real-time to product

formats.name: ASMR Product
formats.description: Emphasis on sounds: opening, texture, application. No speech. Hypnotic.
visual_signals: extreme close-up of product texture or surface
hands slowly touching or manipulating product
focus on tactile or sensory elements

formats.name: Taste Test / Blind Test
formats.description: Product trial for the first time with honest judgment.
visual_signals: person tasting or trying product for first time
blind test setup with hidden labels

formats.name: Honest Review / "Brutally Honest"
formats.description: Unfiltered review with pros and cons. Generates superior trust.
visual_signals: person discussing both pros and cons
product held up or shown during review
balanced or critical tone visible in expressions
text overlays mentioning pros/cons or rating

formats.name: Ranking / Tier List
formats.description: Classification of multiple products in categories (S/A/B/C/D).
visual_signals: tier list graphic with S/A/B/C/D or ranking labels
visual hierarchy showing best to worst
creator pointing to or placing items in tiers

formats.name: Mashup / Compilation UGC
formats.description: Fast montage of multiple UGC clips from different customers.
visual_signals: multiple different people or clips in rapid sequence
varied settings and camera angles across clips

formats.name: Whitelisted / Partnership Ad
formats.description: Creator content promoted from the creator's account (not the brand's).
visual_signals: creator's personal style and branding visible
brand product integrated into creator's aesthetic
posted from creator profile with ad disclosure

formats.name: Customer Review / Quote Card
formats.description: Text review with stars, name and photo on product image.
visual_signals: customer quote or review text on image
product image as background or beside text
negative_signals: no review text or stars visible

formats.name: Video Testimonial
formats.description: Real customer speaks to camera about their experience.
visual_signals: personal story or experience being shared
product visible or referenced during speech

formats.name: Case Study / Customer Story
formats.description: Structured story: situation, challenge, product, result.
visual_signals: before situation and after result shown

formats.name: Social Proof Aggregated
formats.description: Numbers ("50,000+ customers"), media logos, award badges, aggregated ratings.
visual_signals: large numbers or statistics displayed prominently
social proof metrics as main visual element

formats.name: Press / "As Seen In"
formats.description: Mentions from newspapers, magazines, TV shows.
visual_signals: "As Seen In" or "In the Press" text
negative_signals: no media logos or publication names

formats.name: Expert / Authority Endorsement
formats.description: Sector professional validates the product (dermatologist, chef, engineer).
visual_signals: expert in professional setting (lab coat, clinic, kitchen)

formats.name: Influencer / Creator Endorsement
formats.description: Creator presents the product in their own style, leveraging authority and following.
visual_signals: product integrated into creator's content format
creator's branding or visual identity present

formats.name: Awards / Certifications
formats.description: Badges, awards, certifications (organic, cruelty-free).
negative_signals: no badges, seals, or award graphics

formats.name: Comment Box / Native Comment
formats.description: Simulates real social comment below the product. Blends with feed.
visual_signals: comment box or reply thread design
user avatar and username in comment format
product image with overlaid comment bubble

formats.name: Problem-Solution (classic)
formats.description: Two acts: recognizable problem, then product as solution.
visual_signals: resolution or relief shown after product
negative_signals: no problem or pain point depicted

formats.name: Problem-Agitate-Solution (PAS)
formats.description: Three acts: problem, amplification of consequences, solution.

formats.name: Before / After
formats.description: Split screen or sequence before/after use.
visual_signals: before and after labels or indicators
same subject in two different conditions
negative_signals: competitor comparison (that is Us vs. Them)

formats.name: Pain Point Dramatization
formats.description: The problem is exaggerated (with humor or dramatization).
visual_signals: humorous or dramatic staging of frustration
clear contrast between drama and product ease

formats.name: Myth-Busting
formats.description: Debunks common beliefs, positioning the product as truth.
visual_signals: myth vs. fact or truth structure
product positioned as the truthful alternative

formats.name: Expectation vs. Reality
formats.description: Humorous contrast between expectation and reality.
visual_signals: two panels showing expectation and reality
humorous gap between idealized and actual

formats.name: How It Started vs. How It's Going
formats.description: Viral template showing evolution over time.
visual_signals: how it started and how it is going labels
progression or growth shown over time
current success or improvement in second panel

formats.name: Result Tracking / Challenge
formats.description: Documentation over time (7-day, 30-day challenge).

formats.name: Switching Story
formats.description: Customer tells why they abandoned the competitor for you.
visual_signals: reference to previous product or competitor
old product vs. new product shown
reasons for change listed or explained
personal journey from competitor to brand
negative_signals: brand comparison table (that is competitive format)

formats.name: Us vs. Them
formats.description: Direct comparison with competitor: table, split screen, narrative.
visual_signals: two products or brands side by side
split screen with brand vs. competitor
clear winner positioning for the brand

formats.name: Us vs. Old Way
formats.description: Comparison with traditional method or previous solution.
visual_signals: modern product vs. outdated method shown
negative_signals: no traditional or old method shown

formats.name: Side-by-Side Demo
formats.description: Two products tested in parallel with tangible results.
visual_signals: same test applied to both products

formats.name: "Why We're Different"
formats.description: Unique differentiators without naming competitors. Implicit positioning.
visual_signals: brand advantages enumerated without naming rivals
unlike others or only we type messaging

formats.name: Comparison Table
formats.description: Static comparison table with check/X.
visual_signals: table or grid layout with rows and columns
checkmarks and X marks in cells

formats.name: How-To / Tutorial
formats.description: Step-by-step guide to using the product or solving a problem.

formats.name: Step-by-Step / Multi-frame
formats.description: Sequential instructions in multiple frames. Frame 1: result, then steps, then CTA.
visual_signals: multiple frames or panels in sequence
result shown first then steps follow

formats.name: Explainer (Animated or Live)
formats.description: Explains complex concept or product simply. Motion graphics or whiteboard.
visual_signals: complex idea broken into simple visuals

formats.name: Listicle / Benefits List
formats.description: Numbered list (3, 5, 7 reasons why...). Scannable, immediate value.
visual_signals: X reasons why or top X headline
each point with icon or visual marker

formats.name: Feature Highlight / Specs
formats.description: Technical features, ingredients, specifications. Rational approach.

formats.name: Infographic
formats.description: Data, statistics and visuals in dense informational format.
visual_signals: dense information layout with data visualization

formats.name: Stat / Data Callout
formats.description: Single statistical data point with strong visual impact.
visual_signals: large number or percentage as focal point
minimal design centered on one data point
negative_signals: multiple data points or full infographic

formats.name: FAQ Visual
formats.description: Frequently asked questions in visual format. Resolves pre-purchase objections.

formats.name: Tip & Hack / Life Hack
formats.description: Practical advice involving the product. High save/share rate.
visual_signals: did you know or hack text indicators

formats.name: Educational Grid (2x3 / 3x3)
formats.description: Visual grid with informational elements and product as answer.
visual_signals: product positioned as solution in grid
visual grid with icons or images per cell

formats.name: Brand Story / Origin Story
formats.description: Brand story, mission, "why". Emotional connection.
negative_signals: customer story instead of brand story

formats.name: Customer Journey / Success Story
formats.description: Complete customer path: problem, discovery, result.
visual_signals: customer narrative arc from difficulty to success
discovery moment of the product shown
transformation journey of a real person
negative_signals: brand origin story instead of customer

formats.name: Emotional Appeal
formats.description: Deep emotions: nostalgia, joy, belonging, fulfillment.
visual_signals: soft lighting and emotional color grading

formats.name: Aspirational / Lifestyle
formats.description: Sells the lifestyle, not the product. Evocative images.
visual_signals: evocative mood with minimal product focus

formats.name: Mini-Series / Story Arc
formats.description: Sequence of connected ads in chapters ("tease, amplify, echo").
visual_signals: series branding or consistent visual thread

formats.name: Day-in-the-Life (narrative)
formats.description: Typical day showing the product in natural routine.

formats.name: Humor / Comedy / Skit
formats.description: Humor to capture attention and create positive association.

formats.name: Storytime
formats.description: Personal anecdote linked to the product, in narrative style.
visual_signals: personal experience shared in first person

formats.name: Documentary-Style
formats.description: Long, cinematic narrative, focus on the story.

formats.name: Hard Offer / Promo
formats.description: Direct communication of discount, coupon, limited offer.
visual_signals: discount percentage or amount prominently shown
sale or offer text as main element

formats.name: Hard Promise
formats.description: Strong promise ("Results in 30 days or refunded").

formats.name: Countdown / Urgency
formats.description: Timer or deadline to create urgency.
visual_signals: ends tonight or last chance text

formats.name: Scarcity / Limited Edition
formats.description: Limited availability ("Only 50 pieces"). Scarcity psychological bias.
visual_signals: only X left or limited edition text

formats.name: Free Shipping / Bonus Offer
formats.description: Removal of purchase barrier as main message.
visual_signals: bonus item or gift with purchase shown

formats.name: Seasonal / Holiday
formats.description: Themed on season, holiday, event (Black Friday, Christmas).

formats.name: New Launch / Announcement
formats.description: Announces new product or feature. Novelty effect.
visual_signals: NEW or just launched text prominent
negative_signals: restock or sale of existing product

formats.name: Price Anchor
formats.description: Crossed-out price + discounted price, or daily cost.
visual_signals: original amount crossed out with new amount below

formats.name: Bundle / Kit Offer
formats.description: Package at special price. Often in group shot or carousel.
visual_signals: multiple products grouped at special pricing
savings compared to individual purchase shown
grouped product arrangement with offer text

formats.name: Talking Head
formats.description: Person speaks directly to camera. Intimate, conversational.
visual_signals: head and shoulders or waist-up framing

formats.name: Lo-Fi / "Ugly Ads"
formats.description: Intentionally unproduced, shot with phone. Look organic.
visual_signals: native social media look and feel

formats.name: POV (Point of View)
formats.description: First-person perspective. "POV: you discover our product."
visual_signals: subjective camera angle as if viewer is acting

formats.name: Trend-Jacking / Trending Sound
formats.description: Exploits viral trend adapted to the product. Window: 48-72 hours.

formats.name: Meme / Internet Culture
formats.description: Adaptation of popular memes to brand context.
visual_signals: image macro or reaction image format
negative_signals: original branded content without meme reference

formats.name: Challenge / Branded Hashtag
formats.description: Challenge replicable by users using the product.
visual_signals: instructions or rules for a challenge visible

formats.name: Duet
formats.description: Video placed side by side with another video. Reactions, comparisons, complements.
visual_signals: split screen with two videos side by side
two synchronized or responsive video streams

formats.name: Stitch
formats.description: Clip cut from another video + own content in sequence.
visual_signals: clip from another video followed by original response
reference to another creator's content in sequence
two distinct video segments in one clip
negative_signals: single continuous video without external clip

formats.name: Reply to Comment
formats.description: The ad picks up a real comment and responds in video.
visual_signals: pinned comment or comment bubble at top of video
creator responding to a specific user comment
social media comment UI element visible
negative_signals: FAQ format without social comment UI

formats.name: Green Screen
formats.description: Creator on custom background (images, websites, articles).
visual_signals: person overlaid on digital background image
green screen effect with custom backdrop
article, website, or image as background behind person
creator pointing at or referencing background content
visible edge between person and replaced background

formats.name: Screenshot / Native-Looking
formats.description: Simulates real screenshot: notification, chat, email. Blends in feed.
visual_signals: designed to look like organic phone content
negative_signals: clearly designed ad without screenshot feel
no phone UI or app interface elements

formats.name: Street Interview / Vox Pop
formats.description: Casual interviews with people on the street on a topic related to the product.
visual_signals: people interviewed in outdoor public location

formats.name: Bold Text / Typography-First
formats.description: Textual message as protagonist. Large font, contrast, no photo.
visual_signals: large bold typography as main visual element
high contrast between text and background

formats.name: Quote Card
formats.description: Quote (founder, customer, expert) in graphic format.
visual_signals: quotation marks or quote formatting visible
attributed quote with name or source
graphic card design with quote text
minimalist layout centered on the quote
author photo or icon alongside quote

formats.name: Minimalist / Clean
formats.description: Essential design, lots of white space, one message. Premium.
visual_signals: premium or luxury feel through simplicity

formats.name: Color Blocking
formats.description: Contrasting and saturated color blocks. Strong scroll-stopping power.
visual_signals: large blocks of saturated contrasting colors
geometric color sections dividing the frame
bold color palette as primary design element
product placed within or against color blocks

formats.name: Collage / Scrapbook
formats.description: Multiple images, cutouts, overlaid texts in editorial style.
visual_signals: mixed media with photos, text, and graphics

formats.name: Mood Board
formats.description: Aggregation of images, textures, palette to communicate an atmosphere.
visual_signals: collection of thematic images grouped together
color palette swatches or texture samples
cohesive mood or aesthetic communicated through imagery

formats.name: Stop Motion
formats.description: Frame-by-frame animation with real objects. Eye-catching.
visual_signals: jerky or stepped movement characteristic of stop motion
real objects appearing to move on their own

formats.name: GIF / Cinemagraph
formats.description: Image with single element in motion. Halfway between static/video.
visual_signals: mostly still image with one element in subtle motion
seamless loop of minor motion element
negative_signals: fully static image with no motion
full video with all elements moving
complex animation with multiple moving parts

formats.name: Motion Graphics / Animated
formats.description: Animated graphics with text, icons, transitions.

formats.name: Boomerang
formats.description: Clip looping forward-backward. Hypnotic repetition.
visual_signals: single action repeated in reverse loop

formats.name: Kinetic Text / Text Animation
formats.description: Animated text in sync with audio/narration.
visual_signals: text as the primary animated element
negative_signals: graphic icons animated without text focus

formats.name: Timelapse
formats.description: Temporal acceleration of a process.
visual_signals: fast-forwarded process from start to finish
speed indicators or time compression visible
clouds, shadows, or activity moving rapidly

formats.name: Transition / Editing-Driven
formats.description: Video based on creative transitions (outfit change, reveal).
visual_signals: outfit change or transformation via editing cut
smooth or matched transition between shots
transition as the main creative device

formats.name: Montage / Compilation
formats.description: Fast sequence of different clips. Dynamic, high impact.
visual_signals: rapid sequence of multiple different clips
high visual impact through rapid transitions

formats.name: Satisfying / Oddly Satisfying
formats.description: Repetitive movements, textures, colors that generate visual satisfaction.

formats.name: Notepad / Handwritten
formats.description: Handwritten text, blackboard, notepad. Simulates "unproduced" content.
visual_signals: handwritten text on paper or notepad
blackboard or whiteboard with hand-drawn content

formats.name: Infographic Pin
formats.description: Vertical image with data visualized graphically. High save rate.

formats.name: Poll / Quiz Ad
formats.description: Interactive survey or quiz in the ad. [ONLY if UI elements visible]
visual_signals: poll or quiz UI elements visible

formats.name: AR Try-On / Virtual Preview
formats.description: Virtual try-on of the product. [ONLY if AR overlay visible]
visual_signals: AR overlay on real camera feed
virtual product placed on face or body
negative_signals: standard photo of person wearing product
static image without virtual try-on UI

formats.name: Shoppable Video
formats.description: Video with clickable products. [ONLY if product tags/UI visible]
visual_signals: product tags or labels overlaid on video
shopping cart or buy-now UI elements
negative_signals: no shopping UI or product tags

formats.name: Playable Ad
formats.description: Mini interactive playable experience. [ONLY if game UI visible]
visual_signals: play button or game start screen
tap or swipe gameplay UI elements
negative_signals: no game UI or interactive elements
gamification text without actual game interface

formats.name: 360-Degree / Panoramic
formats.description: Explorable content with visual rotation. [ONLY if navigation UI visible]

formats.name: Gamified Ad
formats.description: Game elements (challenges, scores, rewards). [ONLY if game mechanics visible]
visual_signals: reward or achievement badges in ad
negative_signals: no game mechanics or scoring visible
simple interactive poll without game elements
